items.headline_en: New updates and improvements to Runway
items.summary_en: Runway Changelog changed. The visible update appears to be "New updates and improvements to Runway". Open the target URL to see details.
items.evidence_excerpt: New updates and improvements to Runway. Latest updates Apr 7, 2026 Paid Plans Seedance 2.0 Use anything—text, image, video or audio—to generate or edit videos with Seedance 2.0. Now available on Unlimited and Enterprise plans outside the US. Mar 9, 2026 All Plans Runway Characters Introducing Runway Characters. Real-time intelligent avatars you can talk with and learn from. Now available via the Runway API and demo on web. Feb 27, 2026 Paid Plans Nano Banana 2 The most advanced and consistent image generation and editing model. Now available in Runway. Feb 20, 2026 Paid Plans New third party models All of the world’s best models, are now all available right inside of Runway. Including Kling 3.0, Kling 2.6 Pro, Kling 2.5 Turbo Pro, WAN2.2 Animate, GPT-Image-1.5, Sora 2 Pro and many more....
diff_excerpt: -New updates and improvements to Runway. Latest updates Apr 7, 2026 Paid Plans Seedance 2.0 Use anything—text, image, video or audio—to generate or edit videos with Seedance 2.0. Now available on Unlimited and Enterprise plans outside the US. Mar 9, 2026 All Plans Runway Characters Introducing Runway Characters. Real-time intelligent avatars you can talk with and learn from. Now available via the Runway API and demo on web. Feb 27, 2026 Paid Plans Nano Banana 2 The most advanced and consistent image generation and editing model. Now available in Runway. Feb 20, 2026 Paid Plans New third party models All of the world’s best models, are now all available right inside of Runway. Including Kling 3.0, Kling 2.6 Pro, Kling 2.5 Turbo Pro, WAN2.2 Animate, GPT-Image-1.5, Sora 2 Pro and many more. More models coming soon. Jan 21, 2026 Paid Plans Gen-4.5 Image to Video You can now supply a first frame image alongside your text prompt with Gen-4.5. Dec 18, 2025 All Plans New Audio Features Text to Speech is now available via the Audio tab in Tool mode alongside new audio Apps for SFX and Speech to Speech. Dec 11, 2025 Paid Plans Gen-4.5 Introducing Gen-4.5, the world's best video model. Now available for all paid plans. Dec 4, 2025 Paid Plans Publish Workflows as Apps Turn your Workflows into Apps you can share with your workspace. Nov 21, 2025 Paid Plans Workflows Updates Audio nodes, video upscaling nodes and three new featured Workflows available now. Oct 24, 2025 Paid Plans Workflows Create your own custom node-based workflows chaining together multiple models, modalities and intermediary steps for even more control of your generations. Available now. Oct 14, 2025 Paid Plans Apps Apps are an ever-growing collection of use case specific workflows that make it easier than ever to get to great outputs. Apps are available now for web, with more releasing every week. Sep 11, 2025 All Plans Light Mode Light Mode now available in your settings. Update your theme from system settings to Light or Dark Mode for a personalized app experience. Aug 21, 2025 All Plans Game Worlds Beta Explore endless text-based worlds, characters and stories. All generated in real-time as you play. Aug 20, 2025 Paid Plans Voices Change the voice of your performances directly from within the Act-Two interface, giving you more creative flexibility when generating character performances. Aug 19, 2025 All Plans More Ways to Create Added support for select third party models within Chat Mode, and Gen-4 Image Turbo, is now available to all users. Jul 31, 2025 Paid Plans Aleph Aleph is now available for all paid plans. A new way to edit, transform and generate video. Jul 17, 2025 Paid Plans Act-Two Next-generation motion capture model with major improvements in generation quality and support for head, face, body and hand tracking. Jun 25, 2025 All Plans Gen-4 References: Improved Object Consistency An updated version of Gen-4 References that significantly improves object consistency and prompt adherence. Available for all users. Jun 12, 2025 All Plans Chat Mode A new way to create with Gen-4 Images, Videos and References. Generate anything you want, all from within a single conversational interface. Available for all users. May 29, 2025 All Plans Layout Sketch for Gen-4 References Start from a blank canvas or draw on top of an existing image to add new elements and compositions. Available now for all plans. May 16, 2025 API Gen-4 Image in Runway API Gen-4 Image is now available via the Runway API, allowing anyone to integrate its powerful multimodal generation capabilities directly into their apps, products, platforms and websites. May 7, 2025 All Plans Gen-4 Images and References for Free Plan Gen-4 Text to Image and References are now available to Free Plan users. Apr 30, 2025 Paid Plans Gen-4 References Generate consistent characters, locations and more. Now available for paid plans. Apr 7, 2025 All Plans Gen-4 Turbo Our fastest and most efficient video model. Now available to all users. Apr 1, 2025 Paid Plans Gen-4 is now available A new way to generate fast, controllable and production-ready media. Mar 6, 2025 All Plans Restyle Video You can now use a single reference image in Gen-3 Alpha and Turbo to style your Video to Video generations. Feb 22, 2025 Paid Plans New Frames features You can now turn reference images into text prompts and Custom Styles inside Frames. Jan 17, 2025 Paid Plans Frames Our most advanced base model for image generation, offering unprecedented stylistic control and visual fidelity. Now available for Unlimited and Enterprise plans. Jan 10, 2025 Paid Plans Upscale video generations You can now upscale to 4K directly inside Gen-3 Alpha. Making it easer than ever to generate production-ready outputs, all in one place. Jan 9, 2025 All Plans Asset Tags Keep track of assets through complex workflows using tags. Dec 19, 2024 All Plans Middle keyframes in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Add a middle keyframe in addition to first and last keyframes, for more control over your image to video generations. Dec 7, 2024 All Plans Handheld camera shake in Gen-3 Alpha and Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Control handheld shake and speed in your generations using the Edit Video feature in Gen-3 Alpha and Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. Dec 6, 2024 All Plans Character reference videos in Act-One Act-One now allows you to transpose your performances directly onto characters inside of existing videos. Dec 4, 2024 All Plans Static camera control in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Reduce camera motion with the static checkbox for Camera Control in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. Nov 25, 2024 All Plans Act-One in iOS Use Act-One in the Runway iOS mobile app to generate expressive character performances using a single driving video and character image. Nov 23, 2024 All Plans Act-One in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo You can now use Act-One in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo for faster, more affordable generations. Nov 22, 2024 All Plans Expand Video in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo This new feature allows you to transform videos into new aspect ratios by generating new areas around your input video. Nov 15, 2024 All Plans 20s Video to Video generations Generate videos up to 20s using Video to Video in Gen-3 Alpha and Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. Nov 14, 2024 API Runway API updates We have released a number of updates to the Runway API that gives users more features, flexibility and control when integrating Gen-3 Alpha Turbo into their apps and products. Support for First, Last, and First/Last Keyframes, a new self-serve, no commitment usage tier with a higher max concurrency limit, and added support for multi-user organizations allowing you to invite additional users to help manage keys, billing and usage metrics. Nov 9, 2024 Paid Plans Vertical videos in Act-One Generate vertical videos using Act-One with Gen-3 Alpha. Nov 1, 2024 All Plans Camera Control in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Advanced Camera Control is now available for Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. Choose both the direction and intensity of how you move through your scenes for even more intention in every shot. Oct 25, 2024 Paid Plans Act-One in Gen-3 Alpha Introducing, Act-One. A new way to generate expressive character performances inside Gen-3 Alpha using a single driving video and character image. No motion capture or rigging required. Act-One is gradually rolling out to users and will soon be available to everyone. Oct 24, 2024 All Plans Generative Video GIF exports Export your video generations as GIFs from the Gen-2, Gen-3 Alpha and Gen-3 Alpha Turbo generation feeds. Oct 8, 2024 All Plans Keyframes in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Provide both first and last frame inputs for Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. Available for all users on web in both horizontal and vertical aspect ratios. Sep 27, 2024 All Plans Generative Video time editing Edit generations by trimming, reversing and adjusting video speed. Sep 26, 2024 All Plans Video to Video in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Iterate faster than ever before with Video to Video in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. Sep 23, 2024 All Plans Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Extensions Extend generations up to 34s in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. Sep 20, 2024 All Plans Vertical videos in Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Vertical video generations are now available to all users with Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. Sep 20, 2024 Enterprise Credit Analytics Workspace Analytics now contains graphs that provide an overview of credit usage across the workspace. Sep 16, 2024 API Runway API Use our simple-to-integrate API to access our latest and most powerful video models inside a safe and reliable environment. Sep 13, 2024 Paid Plans Video to Video in Gen-3 Alpha Video to Video represents a new control mechanism for precise movement, expressiveness and intent within generations. To use Video to Video, simply upload your input video, prompt in any aesthetic direction you like, or, choose from a collection of preset styles. Sep 4, 2024 Paid Plans Extensions in Gen-3 Alpha Gen-3 Alpha videos can be extended an additional 5 or 10 seconds to create up to 40s of generated video. Aug 14, 2024 All Plans Gen-3 Alpha Turbo Generate 7x faster for half the price of the original Gen-3 Alpha, while still matching performance across many use cases. Aug 9, 2024 All Plans Speech to Speech Retain the content, pace and tone of your input audio while changing the voice. Aug 5, 2024 Paid Plans Gen-3 Alpha last frame Gen-3 Alpha Image to Video now supports using an image as either the first or last frame of your video generation. Jul 29, 2024 All Plans Multi-face Lip Sync Bring more complicated scenes to life and create dynamic dialogue between multiple characters. Jul 29, 2024 Paid Plans Gen-3 Alpha Image to Video Use any image as the first frame of your video generation, either on its own or with a text prompt for additional guidance. Jul 15, 2024 All Plans Mobile App Generation Feed View a feed of Gen-3 Alpha video generations in the Runway mobile app. Jul 9, 2024 All Plans Redesigned Sidebar A newly designed navigation sidebar makes it easier to access commonly used tools. Jul 1, 2024 Paid Plans Gen-3 Alpha Text to Video Gen-3 Alpha is the first of an upcoming series of models trained by Runway on a new infrastructure built for large-scale multimodal training. It is a major improvement in fidelity, consistency, and motion over Gen-2, and a step towards building General World Models . Jun 14, 2024 All Plans Voice Verification Creating a Custom Voice will now require explicit user consent. Jun 3, 2024 All Plans Increased Text to Speech length Text to Speech can now generate up to 10,000 characters in length. May 16, 2024 All Plans Text to Image prompt enhancer Enhance your prompts with a single click inside of Text to Image. Apr 26, 2024 All Plans Gen-2 prompt enhancer You can now enhance your prompts in a single click to get the highest quality outputs from Gen-2. Apr 23, 2024 All Plans 2.5x-longer Lip Sync generations Lip Sync videos can now be 45s in length, up from 20s. Apr 16, 2024 All Plans Lip Sync in Gen-2 Use Lip Sync audio to video directly from within the Gen-2 tool. Apr 15, 2024 All Plans Redesigned AI Training A newly designed AI Training page lets you easily find all custom models, and you can now share models with a workspace. Apr 12, 2024 Enterprise User membership chart in workspace analytics We added a new chart in workspace analytics to view workspace membership. Apr 8, 2024 All Plans Custom styles in Gen-2 You can now use Custom Styles in Gen-2 to create generations in a customized style. Apr 5, 2024 All Plans Workspace Invite Banner Reminders You now see an in-app banner highlighting any outstanding workspace invitations. Apr 5, 2024 Enterprise Support SSO login initiated from IdP SSO users can seamlessly transition from their IdP's login page to Runway without needing to separately login. Apr 5, 2024 All Plans Custom Gen-2 presets Create presets to easily reuse Gen-2 prompt text, camera movements, motion brushes, and other settings. Apr 5, 2024 Enterprise Request SSO access instead of auto-adding users Admins can now configure SSO for new users to request access, instead of auto-adding them to a workspace. Apr 5, 2024 All Plans Updated Gen-2 UI A redesigned Gen-2 user interface that makes even our most complex tools easier to use. Apr 3, 2024 All Plans Filter by favorites in select assets in Gen-1 Gen-2 and Image to Image tools Users can now filter by favorites when selecting assets from within generative tools. Mar 29, 2024 All Plans Sorting on assets page Assets pages are now sortable by asset type, media type, duration, creator, date created, and favorite status. Mar 22, 2024 All Plans Self-service Enterprise sign-up New Enterprises can now upgrade directly within the Runway app. Mar 22, 2024 All Plans Lip Sync Select a face for use with your audio clips, resulting in a generative video where the chosen face speaks any lines contained in the uploaded audio track. Mar 22, 2024 Enterprise Workspace analytics We released a metrics dashboard providing Enterprise admins metrics to help evaluate their Runway use. Mar 20, 2024 Enterprise Invite via link Enterprise admins can now create an invite link that allows anyone on their team to request access. Mar 15, 2024 All Plans Asset renaming in Gen-2 & renaming variables You can now rename assets from within Gen-2 including a set of commonly used variables such as $Date and $Prompt. Mar 6, 2024 All Plans Autosave and save locations for Text to Image and Image to Image You can now set the default save location in generative image tools for all future generations. Feb 26, 2024 All Plans Credit spend history table in user settings You can now see a detailed breakdown of credit spend across all generation tools under Settings > Plans & Billing. Feb 26, 2024 Enterprise Editors can create teamspaces Editors within an Enterprise workspace can now create new teamspaces for collaborating on assets with others. Feb 26, 2024 All Plans Favoriting assets You can now favorite generations that they want to quickly find later. Feb 26, 2024 All Plans Assets V2 We redesigned the assets page to make it easier to find and reuse generations. Feb 26, 2024 All Plans Auto-detect Motion Brush Areas Motion Brush now automatically detects key elements of an input image, making it significantly faster to brush areas. Feb 23, 2024 All Plans Bulk asset action (download move share) Bulk actions within assets make it easier to move, download or delete many assets at once. Feb 21, 2024 All Plans Use Motion Brush on extended clips in Gen-2 Motion Brush can now be used on Gen-2 clips that are being extended beyond the original 4s. Feb 16, 2024 All Plans Scrub video previews within the asset page Within the asset pages, users can now hover over videos to preview different frames. Feb 9, 2024 All Plans Assets page is ~1.5x faster You with a large number of assets have significantly faster loading times. Jan 29, 2024 All Plans Ability to save Gen-2 to folder locations You can now select a specific folder to save gen-2 generations in. Jan 26, 2024 All Plans Share Custom Voices with workspace Share Custom Voices with a workspace. Jan 24, 2024 All Plans 3x longer Text to Speech generations Text-to-speech now supports input up to 3,000 characters in length. Jan 18, 2024 All Plans Multi-Motion Brush Multi-Motion Brush enables Motion Brush for five unique areas of an image with individually-defined motion parameters. Jan 8, 2024 Pro+ Plans Custom Voices Create a Custom Voice for Text to Speech or Lip Sync videos, using a short audio sample.
